item.title: Making a Novelty Spike Knife
item.description: A railroad spike is forged into a novelty knife, showing shaping, grinding, and finishing steps in a creative blacksmithing project.

media:content.media:title: Making a Novelty Spike Knife
media:content.media:description: A railroad spike is forged into a novelty knife, showing shaping, grinding, and finishing steps in a creative blacksmithing project.

item.title: New Mexican Scroll Hook Forging
item.description: A decorative scroll hook inspired by New Mexican design is forged, showing traditional blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing work.

media:content.media:title: New Mexican Scroll Hook Forging
media:content.media:description: A decorative scroll hook inspired by New Mexican design is forged, showing traditional blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing work.

item.title: Forging a Blacksmith Knife
item.description: A blacksmith knife is forged from steel, showing heating, hammering, shaping, and finishing steps to create a functional handmade blade.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Blacksmith Knife
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith knife is forged from steel, showing heating, hammering, shaping, and finishing steps to create a functional handmade blade.

item.title: Spike Tomahawk Forging Process
item.description: A railroad spike is forged into a tomahawk, showing blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing to create a functional and decorative tool.

media:content.media:title: Spike Tomahawk Forging Process
media:content.media:description: A railroad spike is forged into a tomahawk, showing blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing to create a functional and decorative tool.

item.title: Hardening and Tempering Hot Work Tools
item.description: A look at whether hot work tools should be hardened and tempered, explaining steel behavior, durability, and practical blacksmithing considerations.

media:content.media:title: Hardening and Tempering Hot Work Tools
media:content.media:description: A look at whether hot work tools should be hardened and tempered, explaining steel behavior, durability, and practical blacksmithing considerations.

item.title: Forging a Three Legged Skillet
item.description: A three-legged skillet is forged using traditional blacksmithing methods, showing forming, shaping, and finishing for a functional cooking tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Three Legged Skillet
media:content.media:description: A three-legged skillet is forged using traditional blacksmithing methods, showing forming, shaping, and finishing for a functional cooking tool.

item.title: Installing a KANCA Leg Vise
item.description: A new KANCA leg vise is installed in a blacksmith shop, showing setup, mounting, and how it improves workholding for metalworking tasks.

media:content.media:title: Installing a KANCA Leg Vise
media:content.media:description: A new KANCA leg vise is installed in a blacksmith shop, showing setup, mounting, and how it improves workholding for metalworking tasks.

item.title: Primitive Knife Making Process
item.description: A primitive knife is forged using traditional methods, showing simple tools, heating, shaping, and finishing a functional handmade blade.

media:content.media:title: Primitive Knife Making Process
media:content.media:description: A primitive knife is forged using traditional methods, showing simple tools, heating, shaping, and finishing a functional handmade blade.

item.title: Forging a Simple Woodworking Holdfast
item.description: A blacksmithing process for making a functional holdfast, showing heating, shaping, and finishing steps for a reliable woodworking clamp tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Simple Woodworking Holdfast
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing process for making a functional holdfast, showing heating, shaping, and finishing steps for a reliable woodworking clamp tool.

item.title: A Blacksmithing Journey in Forging
item.description: A look into a blacksmithing journey, showcasing traditional forging techniques, metal shaping, and the process of building skill through hands-on craft work.

media:content.media:title: A Blacksmithing Journey in Forging
media:content.media:description: A look into a blacksmithing journey, showcasing traditional forging techniques, metal shaping, and the process of building skill through hands-on craft work.

item.title: Macrame Inspired Blacksmithing Tapestry
item.description: A creative blacksmithing piece inspired by macrame design, showing decorative metalwork, twisting techniques, and artistic forging for a tapestry-like result.

media:content.media:title: Macrame Inspired Blacksmithing Tapestry
media:content.media:description: A creative blacksmithing piece inspired by macrame design, showing decorative metalwork, twisting techniques, and artistic forging for a tapestry-like result.

item.title: Tiny Grinder With Big Power
item.description: A compact grinder is tested for surprising performance, showing its cutting power, control, and real-world usefulness despite its small size.

media:content.media:title: Tiny Grinder With Big Power
media:content.media:description: A compact grinder is tested for surprising performance, showing its cutting power, control, and real-world usefulness despite its small size.
